name: Iris Wand - Dream Magical!
desc:
Apply 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect once per turn):
● Send 1 LIGHT Fairy monster from your Extra Deck to the GY; return 1 card your opponent controls to the hand.
● If your opponent controls a monster that was Special Summoned from the Deck or Extra Deck: Draw 2 cards.
strings: Send 1 LIGHT Fairy from Extra Deck to GY; return 1 opponent card to hand
